classAttributeVisibilityIconShape circle class Display { +getColumns(): int +getRows(): int +getRowText(row: int): String +show(): void } class StringDisplay { -string: String +getColumns(): int +getRows(): int +getRowText(row: int): String } class Border { #display: Display +Border(display: Display) } class SideBorder { -borderChar: char +SideBorder(display: Display, ch: char) +getColumns(): int +getRows(): int +getRowText(row: int): String } class FullBorder { +FullBorder(display: Display) +getColumns(): int +getRows(): int +getRowText(row: int): String -makeLine(ch: char, count: int): void } Display <|-- StringDisplay Display <|-- Border Border <|-- SideBorder Border <|-- FullBorder note top of Display A end note note top of StringDisplay C end note note top of Border A end note note top of SideBorder C end note note top of FullBorder C end note @enduml
